string.name: changelog_1_6_3_beta
string.font:
✓ Community Edition: Introduced a new build flavor tailored for open-source environments, replacing Play Store links with GitHub "Stars" and removing proprietary billing components. 
✓ Abstracted Market Interactions: Implemented a new App Market Manager to handle updates and reviews across different platforms (Play Store vs. GitHub). 
✓ Multi-Flavor Billing Support: Refactored the billing system into "Actual" (Google Play) and "Stub" (Premium/Gold) implementations to support restricted regions and special editions. 
✓ Analytics Abstraction: Telemetry is now flavor-aware; standard builds use Firebase/Crashlytics, while Community and Gold versions use a privacy-focused no-op implementation. 
✓ Security & Stability: 
 • Added RSA signature verification for in-app purchases. 
 • Improved update flow error handling to prevent crashes in non-Google Play environments. 
✓ Under the Hood: 
 • Upgraded build infrastructure: Gradle 9.5.0, AGP 9.3.0, and Kotlin 2.4.10. 
 • Updated project metadata and branding from "Audiofy" to "OnePlayer".

string.name: changelog_1_6_2_beta
string.font:
✓ Multi-Flavor Support: Introduced specialized editions: Standard, Community, Plus, and Gold. 
✓ Video Scaling Persistence: Fixed an issue where video scale settings were lost when switching between video and audio content. 
✓ UI Refinements: Improved Labs Mode visual alignment and refined storage permission dialogs with justified text for better readability. 
✓ Under the Hood: 
 • Migrated to a centralized `AppConfig` system for better metadata handling. 
 • Expanded Firebase support for Full and Pro variants. 
 • Upgraded to Android 37 (compileSdk).

string.name: changelog_1_6_1_beta
string.font:
✓ Enhanced Promotions: Introduced a smarter rotation system for promotional messages and tips. 
✓ IAP Integration: New dynamic prompts for In-App Purchases, featuring high-priority products with clear calls-to-action. 
✓ Frequency Adjustment: Increased the frequency of helpful prompts and "What's New" notifications for a better discovery experience. 
✓ Modernized Foundation: 
 • Upgraded target SDK to Android 37. 
 • Updated core dependencies including Kotlin 2.4.0 and AGP 9.2.1. 
 • Refreshed Media3 (1.10.1), Coil (3.5.0), and Play Billing (9.0.0). 
✓ UX Improvements: 
 • Isolated "What's New" logic to trigger independently with a smoother delay. 
 • Standardized snackbar durations and added specific iconography for purchase prompts.

string.name: changelog_1_6_0_beta
string.font:
✓ Background Playback Policies: Introduced a new system to control media behavior when the app is hidden. Choose between "None" (pause), "Audio Only" (stops video but keeps audio), or "All" (keep playing). 
✓ App Visibility Tracking: The playback service now accurately tracks when the app is in the foreground or background to enforce playback rules. 
✓ Settings Update: Added a "Background Play Mode" selector in the settings screen. 
✓ Smart Enforcement: Automatically pauses video playback when entering the background if the current policy doesn't allow it. 
✓ New Icon: Added a new "Exit to App" icon for the background playback setting. 
✓ Under the Hood: 
 • Renamed the internal `relay` system to `remote` for better architectural clarity. 
 • Improved MIME type detection to distinguish between audio and video content more reliably. 
 • Updated key dependencies (nav3, androidx-koin) and bumped version to 1.6.0.

string.name: changelog_1_5_10_beta
string.font:
✓ Enhanced subtitle rendering with native Media3 support for richer, more accurate captions 
✓ Upgraded playback engine (Media3 v1.10.0) for improved stability and performance 
✓ Cleaner UI integration with new SubtitleView in Compose 
✓ Dependency updates and minor fixes for smoother playback experience

string.name: changelog_158_beta
string.font:
✓ Labs Mode: A new experimental features hub. First experiment: Long-Press to Seek on the Now Playing screen. 
✓ Playback UX: Clicking a video now jumps directly to Now Playing after starting playback. 
✓ Icon System Refactor: Replaced `material-icons-extended` with local XML vector drawables for better performance and simpler icon management. 
✓ Build & Dependency Updates: 
 • Upgraded Gradle (9.1.0 → 9.3.1) and refreshed key dependencies (AGP, Kotlin, Media3, Compose BOM, Navigation, etc.).

string.name: changelog_156_beta
string.font:
✓ Icon System Refactor: Replaced the `material-icons-extended` library with local XML vector drawables, improving performance by avoiding reflection and streamlining icon management. 
✓ Build & Dependency Cleanup: 
 • Removed the unused `telemetry` feature module. 
 • Refactored and organized the version catalog (`libs.versions.toml`) for better clarity and maintenance. 
✓ Code Modernization: 
 • Implemented a type-safe `Res` object for resource access (e.g., `Res.string.delete`), enhancing code readability and safety. 
 • Centralized and renamed theme-related enums (`NightMode`, `AccentColorPolicy`) for better organization.

string.name: changelog_155_beta
string.font:
✓ Modernized UI handling: 
 • Adopted WindowCompat.enableEdgeToEdge(window) for improved system bar & cutout support. 
✓ Deprecated API cleanup: 
 • Replaced setDecorFitsSystemWindows(window, false) with enableEdgeToEdge(window).

string.name: changelog_154_beta
string.font:
✓ Updated dependencies for improved stability: 
 • media3 → 1.9.0 
 • androidx-activity-compose → 1.12.2 
 • google-billing-ktx → 8.3.0 
✓ Enabled Compose compiler stability configuration. 
✓ Refined two-pane layout logic: 
 • Aspect ratio-based triggers for better tablet portrait handling. 
 • Horizontal split ratio set to 0.55f. 
 • Added 10dp spacing between panes. 
✓ Library view now adapts to aspect ratio for consistent single-pane in portrait. 
✓ Acrylic effect fine-tuned with adjusted luminance and alpha for subtle theme improvements.

string.name: changelog_153_beta
string.font: \n✓ Refreshed icons across app, splash, and TV for a cleaner look. \n✓ Added intermediate progress indicator to improve feedback during delayed startup.

string.name: changelog_152_beta
string.font:
✓ Resolved issue causing incomplete splash animation. 
✓ Added monochromatic icon for themed app icon support. 
✓ Introduced TV channel and banner icons. 
✓ Implemented a robust Analytics module in core (migrated from telemetry).

string.name: changelog_151_beta
string.font:
✓ Splash animation delay increased to 1000ms for smoother transitions. 
✓ Fixed issue where sharedBounds background was not cleared in Console when disabled. 
✓ Introduced a concrete Analytics implementation in the core module (moved from telemetry).

string.name: changelog_150_beta
string.font:
✓ Improved immersive experience by removing background from system navigation. 
✓ Added a toggle to wait for the splash animation to finish before continuing into the app. 
✓ Added a toggle to enable shared element transitions between the in-app widget and the Now Playing screen. 
✓ Gestures: - Added background styling around gesture visual feedback. - Implemented safe area checks to prevent gestures outside a 30dp boundary. - Fixed issue where double-tap seek incorrectly registered a value of 2 on the first multi-tap instead of 1. - Fixed brightness control to start from at least 10% when automatic mode is enabled. - Added logic to intercept hardware Enter keys (useful for TVs and similar devices). - Fixed issue causing repeated toast messages when holding click for long press. - Fixed issue where the in-app widget appeared when tapping “Show Equalizer” in Console. 
✓ TimeBar: Fixed issue with enable/disable logic not working correctly.

string.name: changelog_141_beta
string.font:
✓ Animated Splash Screen: Introducing a new animated splash screen for Android 12+ for a more dynamic startup experience. 
✓ Smarter Video Playback: 
 - The screen now stays on only when video is playing and turns off when paused to save battery. 
 - Subtitle display logic has been improved to prevent cues from disappearing abruptly. 
 - The layout of the seek bar in a locked video player has been refined for better alignment. 
✓ UI & Icon Updates: 
 - Updated several icons, including a new horizontal "more" icon in the player console. 
 - The seek bar is now disabled when the player is idle. 
 - Reduced the default font size for subtitles for better visual balance. 
✓ Code Refinements: 
 - Restructured player gesture handling for improved readability and maintainability. 
 - Introduced new UI components like `FloatRange` and `LottieAnimatedIcon` to streamline the codebase.

string.name: changelog_140_beta
string.font:
✓ Advanced Gesture Controls: The player now features a completely rewritten gesture system for a more intuitive experience. 
 - Multi-Tap to Seek: Quickly tap multiple times on the sides of the screen to seek forward or backward. 
 - Long-Press for Speed: Press and hold anywhere on the screen to temporarily double the playback speed. 
 - Precise Drag Controls: Drag vertically on the left/right side of the screen to adjust brightness/volume, or drag horizontally to scrub through the timeline. 
✓ Enhanced Player UI: 
 - Redesigned console with new background and play button styles for better customization. 
 - Improved visibility logic ensures controls hide and show more smoothly, especially in locked mode. 
✓ Smarter Playback Restoration: 
 - The player now correctly restores its last playback position and shuffle order on startup. 
 - Fixed an issue where content duration was lost after an app restart, preventing an infinite progress bar. 
✓ Performance & Code Quality: 
 - Major refactoring of the player console and gesture handling for improved maintainability and clarity. 
 - Enabled the optimized R8 resource shrinker to reduce app size.

string.name: changelog_132_beta
string.font: \n✓ Performance Boost: Enhanced Jetpack Compose performance and stability by enabling strong skipping and marking key UI components as stable. This helps reduce unnecessary UI updates and provides a smoother experience. \n✓ UI Layout Refinements: Adjusted layout breakpoints for better display on various screen sizes.

string.name: changelog_131_beta
string.font:
✓ Video Thumbnail Support: The player now displays thumbnails for video files, making it easier to identify your media at a glance. 
✓ Enhanced Media Notifications: Album art and video thumbnails now load more efficiently in Media3 notifications, thanks to integration with the Coil image loading library. 
✓ UI Refinements: The player console has been updated with a subtler gradient and simplified layout constraints for a cleaner look. 
✓ New Icon: Added a new stop icon for future use.

string.name: changelog_124_beta
string.font:
✓ Evenly Spaced Layouts: Introduced a new `spacing` parameter to horizontal chains, simplifying the creation of evenly spaced UI elements. This has been applied to the options row in the player console. 
✓ Dependency Updates: 
 - Updated Jetpack Compose to `1.10.0-rc01`.

string.name: changelog_123_beta
string.font:
✓ Finer Playback Speed Control: 
 - The playback speed range has been expanded to 0.25x – 8.0x (previously 3.0x). 
 - Enjoy more precise adjustments with a smaller step interval of 0.05x. 
✓ Improved Widget Configuration: 
 - The layout of the bottom bar has been rearranged for better usability. 
 - Added a fallback text of "N/A" for purchase buttons when the price isn't available. 
✓ Internal Refactoring: Replaced a custom UI scaling modifier with the standard Jetpack Compose implementation, simplifying the codebase and improving performance.

string.name: changelog_122_beta
string.font:
✓ Streamlined Widget Configuration: The widget setup screen has been simplified. We've replaced the horizontal swipe gesture with easy-to-use left/right arrow buttons for a more straightforward navigation experience. 
✓ Performance & UI Polish: 
 - Optimized the scaling modifier used across the app, leading to better performance and smoother animations. 
 - Standardized the layout, padding, and icon sizes across all home screen widgets for a more consistent and polished look. 
 - Updated the app name from "OnePlayer" to "One Player" (with a space) in a few places for brand consistency.

string.name: changelog_121_beta
string.font:
✓ All-New TimeBar: The progress bar has been completely redesigned from the ground up for a smoother, more interactive experience. 
 - Enhanced Animations: Enjoy slick animations when you interact with the time bar. 
 - Buffering Indicator: A new loading animation shows you exactly when the media is buffering. 
 - Keyboard Accessible: Fully navigable with keyboard controls for seeking. 
✓ Faster Playback Startup: Media now prepares for playback as soon as you open the player, reducing the delay before you can press play. 
✓ Cleaner "Recently Played" List: The "Recently Played" section no longer shows duplicate tracks. 
✓ UI & Bug Fixes: Made several layout adjustments in the player for better organization and fixed minor bugs.

string.name: changelog_110_beta
string.font:
✓ Subtitle Support: You can now watch videos with subtitles! Select a subtitle track from the new unified track selection menu. 
✓ Unified Track Selection: The audio, video, and subtitle track selection dialogs have been merged into one. Easily switch between track types and make your selection in a single, streamlined interface. 
✓ Faster Remote Media Loading: Adding media from URLs (HTTP/HTTPS) is now significantly faster. We now fetch metadata without downloading the entire file first, reducing delays. 
✓ UI Refinements: 
 - Adjusted the range for the "Grid Item Size" slider for better control. 
 - The track selection list no longer shows duplicate track names.

string.name: changelog_104_beta
string.font: \n✓ Fixed a crash caused by duplicate keys in the library\'s recents section.

string.name: changelog_103_beta
string.font:
✓ Enhanced Error Handling: Added detailed snackbar notifications for failed dynamic feature installations, including an option to view specific error codes. 
✓ In-App Purchase Fix: Corrected the identifier for the "Remove Ads" in-app purchase to ensure it functions as intended. 
✓ UI Refinements: 
 - Adjusted the BottomAppBar's padding to prevent it from overlapping with system navigation gestures.

string.name: changelog_102_beta
string.font:
✓ New Look & Feel: Refreshed the app with new launcher icons and a redesigned splash screen for a modern identity. 
 
✓ Player Enhancements: 
 - Fixed the double-tap to seek gesture to correctly skip 10 seconds per tap. 
 - Easily show system bars in fullscreen by swiping from the screen edge. 
 - Improved the control layout in the landscape player for a cleaner look. 
 - The privacy policy link in settings now works correctly.

string.name: changelog_101_beta
string.font:
✓ Rebranded from "Audiofy" to "OnePlayer" 
 - This includes a new application ID, updated package names, and a fresh user-facing name. 
✓ Minimum SDK Increased: 
 - The minimum required Android version has been raised from Android 6.0 (API 23) to Android 9.0 (API 28) to leverage modern Android features and ensure a more stable experience. 
✓ Dependency Updates: 
 - Updated essential libraries like Kotlin and Compose to their latest versions for improved performance and stability.

string.name: changelog_400_test01
string.font:
✓ Six New Player Widget Styles: 
 - Tiramisu: Inspired by the Android 13 media notification, with a full-width album art background and centered controls. 
 - GradientGroves: Features a vibrant gradient and a unique "double vision" artwork effect. 
 - RedVioletCake: Based on the Android 11 media notification, with large artwork on the right and controls on the left. 
 - DiskDynamo: Showcases a rotating CD-style album art that animates while playing. 
 - MistyDream: A glassmorphism-style widget with a blurred background and a large, stylized chronometer. 
 - SkewedDynamic: A dynamic design with slanted shapes for both the widget body and album art. 
 
✓ Refined Gesture Control: 
 - The delay for the double-tap to seek gesture has been significantly reduced from 1000ms to 200ms, making it feel much more responsive.
